name: ToolOracle
description: Agent Trust Runtime — 89 self-hosted MCP servers with 1,043 tools across 7 categories. Complete agent lifecycle: identity (KYA), policy enforcement (258 rules), fraud detection, self-healing support, and cryptographically signed Trust Passports. x402 USDC micropayments on Base.

supportedInterfaces.description: A2A Task endpoint for agent-to-agent communication
AgentGuard MCP endpoint — policy enforcement and agent security

skills.name: Agent Identity & Registration (KYA)
skills.description: Register agent identity with Know-Your-Agent verification. Issues client ID, trust score, and scoped access tokens. Agents prove who they are before accessing any tool.
examples: Register my agent for ToolOracle access

skills.name: Policy Enforcement (AgentGuard)
skills.description: 258 risk policies across all 1,043 tools. Pre-flight compliance check before any tool call. Role-based scoping with 144 scope definitions. Rate limiting, spend limits, and payload safety.
examples: Can my agent call the sanctions_screen tool?
Check if this action is allowed
What policies apply to blockchain tools?

skills.name: Fraud Detection (DetectiveOracle)
skills.description: Behavioral analysis and anomaly detection for AI agents. Identifies suspicious patterns, unusual call sequences, and potential abuse. Real-time scoring with configurable thresholds.

skills.name: Trust Passport
skills.description: One signed document combining identity, reputation, risk assessment, and evidence. Cryptographically signed with ES256K. Verifiable by any agent. The agent equivalent of a passport.
examples: Issue a Trust Passport for my agent
What is this agent's reputation score?

skills.name: Tool Execution (1,043 Tools)
skills.description: Execute any of 1,043 MCP tools across 7 categories: Compliance & Regulation, Blockchain & DeFi, Finance & Markets, Business Intelligence, Travel & Lifestyle, Trust & Agent Infrastructure, Payment & Settlement. All calls pass through AgentGuard policy engine.
examples: Search for flights from Berlin to London

skills.name: Self-Healing Support (SupportOracle)
skills.description: Automated onboarding, diagnostics, and recovery. Agents get personalized guides, auto-diagnosis at 3 AM, and self-recovery when tools fail. Ticket system for complex issues.
examples: Diagnose why my tool call failed

skills.name: Partnership & Deal Intelligence (DealOracle)
skills.description: Autonomous business development agent. Scans 2,275+ MCP servers, qualifies partnerships, scores revenue potential, and generates outreach templates. Daily ecosystem reports.
examples: Find MCP servers compatible with our tools

skills.name: x402 Micropayments
skills.description: Pay-per-call USDC micropayments on Base network. $0.01 per tool call. HTTP 402 protocol — agents pay only for what they use. No subscriptions, no API keys for payment.
examples: How much does a compliance check cost?
